users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage site accounts, administrator access, account status, and session revocation.
users.inviteUserDescription: Send a registration invitation to an email address. Existing pending invitations for that address will be updated to the latest invitation.
users.invitationsDescription: Review invitation records, copy registration links, or revoke invitations that are still pending.
users.confirmRevokeInvitation: Revoke the pending invitation for {{email}}? The existing link will stop working.
users.noInvitationsDescription: No user invitations have been created yet.
users.detailDescription: Manage account details, security actions, and Minecraft profiles and textures owned by this account.
users.detailPageDescription: Review and maintain one account's profile, access status, login security, and Minecraft assets.
users.detailNotFoundDescription: This user does not exist, or you do not have permission to view it.
users.emptyDescription: Created or invited accounts will be listed after they exist.
users.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the keyword, role, or status filters and search again.
users.operatorScopesDescription: Operators can only access enabled admin areas. Administrators always have full permissions and cannot be scoped down.
users.adminScopePolicy: Administrators always have full admin permissions. Use the operator role when permissions need to be scoped.
users.createDescription: Create a local site account and set its initial role, status, and password policy.
users.passwordCreateHint: 8-128 characters. Leave blank to generate a temporary password.
users.passwordCreatePlaceholder: Leave blank to generate a temporary password
users.generatedPasswordDialogDescription: {{username}} has been created. Copy the temporary password now; it cannot be shown again after this window closes.
users.generatedPasswordDescription: Copy it now and share it through a secure channel. The plaintext password is not stored or shown again.
users.forcePasswordChange: Require password change at next sign-in
users.createForcePasswordChangeDescription: When enabled, the user can only enter the password-change flow on first sign-in. If the password is generated, the backend forces this on.
users.forcePasswordChangeDescription: When enabled, the user can only access password change, profile, and logout flows until the password is changed.
users.forcePasswordChangeDisabled: Password change is not required at next sign-in.
users.accountSectionDescription: Update account sign-in identity, administrator access, and status.
users.securitySectionDescription: Reset the sign-in password or revoke all current browser sessions for this user.
users.minecraftSectionDescription: Review Minecraft profiles linked to this account and open profile details to manage texture bindings.
users.noMinecraftProfiles: This user has no Minecraft profiles.
users.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the account, uploaded avatar, Minecraft profiles, textures, wardrobe items, sessions, passkeys, and linked external identities.
users.initialAdminDeleteBlocked: The initial administrator cannot be deleted.
users.revokeSessionsDescription: The user will need to sign in again. The account, profiles, and texture bindings are not deleted.

bans.sectionDescription: Restrict this user's product capabilities by scope. Public texture library browsing is not covered by bans.
bans.empty: This user has no ban records.
bans.createDescription: Select the product capability to restrict and provide the reason and optional time window.
bans.editDescription: Update the scope, reason, or expiry time for an active ban.
bans.revokeDescription: Revoke the active {{scope}} ban? The user regains this capability immediately.
bans.eventsDescription: Creation, update, and revocation events for ban #{{id}}.
bans.scopeRequired: Select at least one capability scope.
